key_findings: Content negotiation added for /:slug requests. Requests with Accept headers for text/plain or application/json, as well as bot User-Agents (ClaudeBot, GPTBot, curl, etc.), now receive raw content directly instead of the view.html SPA redirect.

notes: Extracted DB fetch logic from content negotiation to getDocumentWithContent(). Rendered initial state with viewTemplate.ts. Replaced client-side loading with server-sent HTML containing document content.

key_findings: Added support for explicit file extensions on slug URLs.
Added Link headers and meta tags for API discovery.

title: T233 Decomposition: PostgreSQL Migration
summary: Decomposed epic T233 into 12 atomic tasks across setup, code porting, and cutover phases. All tasks wired with dependencies; T234 and T235 ready to start immediately.
notes: RCASD Lead completed Research stage with SPEC and ADR. This stage executed Decomposition mechanically. All 12 tasks include 3-5 acceptance criteria derived from spec requirements.

key_findings: W1 schema consolidator: added 5 tables (section_crdt_states, section_crdt_updates, document_events, agent_pubkeys, agent_signature_nonces) to schema-pg.ts+schema.ts. Drizzle migration 20260415235846 + raw-SQL follow-up 20260416000001. PG migration exit 0, idempotency verified. 67/67 tests pass. T193+T225 subsumed and marked done.
